steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The calf weighs $5{,}800 + 250n$ pounds after $n$ days. The constraint is $8{,}800 < 5{,}800 + 250n < 9{,}800$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Subtract $5{,}800$ throughout: $3{,}000 < 250n < 4{,}000$. Divide by $250$: $12 < n < 16$. Since $n$ is an integer, the valid values are $n = 13, 14, 15$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $13,14,15$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $13,14,15$.
